form.formComment: Raced twice to date. When unwanted in the market at debut, finished seventh of 9 starters at Wetherby on March 17 over 3200m, 40 len behind Minella Premier with 69.5kg at $67. Second-up finished fourth in a small field at Wetherby on March 27 over 3200m, 8 len behind Matador St Georges carrying 71kg at $67. Prefer to see at first outing over the obstacles.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation 3 of 8 runners at Cragmore P2p January 25 over 4828m, slow track; 8 len behind Moltezuma with 61kg. First ever start ran didn't finish the race at Turtulla P2p November 16 over 4828m. Hard to have without further improvement.

form.formComment: Having third race start. Won at debut won by 1.3 len Maisemore Park on March 30 2025 over 3200m defeating About Time Too with 72kg in a jumps. Went for a spell before returning finished fifth of 12 runners at Uttoxeter on March 14 over 3200m, on slow going 21 len behind Sassipants carrying 71kg at $9. Cannot be ruled out.
